notes: Three A+H cross-listing pairs projected into StockBasicRecord shape. Each pair = 1 A-side row + 1 H-side row; 6 rows total. Pair membership sourced from stk_ah_comparison/by_symbol; A-side identity from stock_basic; H-side identity from hk_basic; fullname from stock_company (A-side) or hk_basic.fullname (H-side). The fixture proves entity-registry's cross-listing detector produces ONE cross_listing_group per pair (group shared across A and H) AND two DIFFERENT canonical_entity_id values per pair (zero-tolerance invariant — never merge A and H into a single canonical id, entity-registry/CLAUDE.md). Pairs: 中兴通讯 000063.SZ↔00763.HK (深股通 S / H 股 H), 中集集团 000039.SZ↔02039.HK (同), 万科 000002.SZ万科A↔02202.HK万科企业 (同).
